analysis: The project is a website about black holes with a cosmic theme. The current files include HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for the test website. The theme needs to be enhanced with black hole visuals, animations, and interactive elements. The existing CSS and HTML files are incomplete and need to be updated to reflect the black hole theme with animated objects and slides.

improvements.description: Enhance the CSS with dark cosmic colors, animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements to create a dynamic and immersive black hole theme.
Complete the HTML content to include sections for black hole information, interactive planets, animated slides, and a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon.
Fix syntax errors and implement JavaScript functions for smooth transitions, mobile menu toggle, and interactive elements to ensure all features are properly functional.
